description: Draws a cross mark annotation between two endpoints. Creates an X mark symbol to indicate incorrect or invalid items with optional styling.
utility: Mark incorrect answers or invalid items with cross symbols

arguments.name: from
arguments.description: Starting point for the cross mark, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: to
arguments.description: Ending point for the cross mark, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)
